queue.title: Complaints queue
queue.subtitle: Filter and open cases for triage, assignment, and workflow actions.
queue.scopedHint: Showing cases assigned to you and unassigned items in triage or submitted status.
queue.subject: Subject
queue.emptyDescription: Adjust filters or wait for new submissions.

detail.notFoundDescription: This case may not exist or you may not have access to it.
detail.phase8Description: This tab will be available in a future release.
detail.assignBlockedHint: Assignment is handled by Complaints Admin. Case Officers may self-assign only from unassigned triage as a fallback.
detail.qaReviewBanner: This case is awaiting your QA review. Read the response draft below before approving or returning for revision.
detail.qaReviewMissingDraft: No response draft has been saved yet. Return the case for revision so the officer can complete the draft.

response.title: Response draft
response.description: Draft the complainant-facing response letter. Save before sending to QA review.
response.minLengthHint: At least 20 characters are required before QA review.
response.emptyReadOnly: No response draft has been saved.
response.unavailableDescription: The response draft is shown during investigation, draft response, QA review, and after a response is issued.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Upload draft letters, evidence, and supporting attachments for this case.
documents.uploadHint: Allowed: PDF, Word, Excel, JPEG, PNG, GIF, MP4, MP3 (max 25 MB).
documents.emptyDescription: Upload files to attach evidence or draft letters to this case.
documents.noAccessDescription: You do not have permission to view documents on this case.
documents.deleteConfirmDescription: Remove “{name}” from this case. This cannot be undone.
documents.downloadNotReady: Download is available after the file passes virus scanning.

actions.assignDescription: Assign this case to an officer for investigation.
actions.transitionDescription: Move this case to the next workflow step.
actions.transitionReasonHint: Enter at least 5 characters explaining why this status change is needed.
actions.transitionReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Field verification started by assigned officer.
actions.reasonTooShort: Enter a reason with at least 5 characters.
actions.approveDescription: Issue the approved response and move this case to response issued.
actions.returnDescription: Send this case back to draft response for further edits.
actions.escalateDescription: Record an escalation for oversight. This does not change the case status.
actions.escalateReasonHint: Enter at least 3 characters explaining the escalation.
actions.escalateReasonTooShort: Enter a reason with at least 3 characters.
actions.appealDescription: Move this case into appeal status for reassignment and review.
actions.appealReasonHint: Enter at least 10 characters explaining why this case is appealed.
actions.appealReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Complainant requested formal appeal after response.
actions.appealReasonTooShort: Enter a reason with at least 10 characters.
actions.workflowForbidden: You are not allowed to perform this action.
actions.validationError: This transition is not allowed for the current status.
actions.assignSelfDescription: Pick up this unassigned case for yourself.
actions.assignSelfHint: You will be assigned as the investigating officer.

workflowBlocked.title: Action not available for your role
workflowBlocked.handledBy: This step is typically handled by: {roles}
workflowBlocked.createTask: Create a follow-up task on this case

reasons.missing_permission: Your account does not have the required workflow permission.
reasons.not_assignee: Only the assigned officer can perform this step.
reasons.self_assign_not_allowed: Self-assign is only allowed from unassigned triage.
reasons.already_assigned: This case is already assigned to another officer.
reasons.invalid_status: This action is not valid for the current case status.

history.title: History
history.emptyDescription: Assignment and status changes will appear here.

notes.title: Notes
notes.emptyDescription: Add an internal note for collaborators on this case.
notes.author: Author

tasks.emptyDescription: Create follow-up tasks for this case.
tasks.noAccessDescription: You do not have permission to view tasks on this case.

intake.title: Assisted complaint intake
intake.subtitle: Register a walk-in or phone complaint on behalf of a citizen.
intake.subject: Subject
intake.consent: I confirm the complainant consented to data processing.
intake.validationSubject: Subject must be at least 5 characters.
intake.validationDescription: Description must be at least 20 characters.
